componentDescription: A component for uploading files, offering validation, previews, and progress tracking.

accept.description: Specifies the accepted file types, e.g., 'image/*', '.pdf', or a comma-separated list of extensions.

maxSize.description: Sets the maximum allowed file size in bytes for client-side validation.

onFileSelect.description: Callback function invoked when a single file is successfully selected and validated.

onMultipleFileSelect.description: Callback function invoked when multiple files are successfully selected and validated.

validateFile.description: A custom function to validate individual files, returning an error message string or null if valid.

onError.description: Callback function triggered when an error occurs during file selection or validation.

thumbnail.description: A URL for a default thumbnail or placeholder image to display.

multiple.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the user can select multiple files.

containerProps.description: Props to be passed to the main container `View` component.

errorMessageProps.description: Props to be passed to the `Text` component displaying error messages.

thumbnailContainerProps.description: Props to be passed to the `View` component wrapping the thumbnail display.

loadingProps.description: Props to be passed to the `View` component for the loading indicator.

progressProps.description: Props to be passed to the `View` component for the progress display.

videoProps.description: Props to be passed to the `View` component containing the video preview.

imageProps.description: Props to be passed to the `Image` component for image previews.

iconProps.description: Props to be passed to the `Icon` component.

textProps.description: Props to be passed to a generic `Text` component.

renderVideo.description: A custom render prop function to display a video preview.
renderVideo.defaultValue: (({ selectedFile, videoRef, videoProps }) => <View width="100%" height="100%" position="relative" {...views?.view}><View as="video" width="100%" height="100%" src={selectedFile ? URL.createObjectURL(selectedFile) : undefined} style={{ objectFit: 'cover' }} ref={videoRef} {...videoProps} {...views?.view}/></View>)

renderText.description: A custom render prop function to display text content.

renderImage.description: A custom render prop function to display an image preview.
renderImage.defaultValue: (({ previewUrl, imageProps }) => <View width="100%" height="100%" position="relative" {...views?.view}><Image src={previewUrl} alt="Preview" width="100%" height="100%" objectFit="cover" style={{ maxHeight: '100%', maxWidth: '100%' }} {...imageProps} {...views?.image}/></View>)

renderError.description: A custom render prop function to display error messages.
renderError.defaultValue: (({ errorMessage, errorMessageProps, themeMode: elementMode }) => <Text color="red" fontSize={12} marginTop={8} {...errorMessageProps} {...views?.text}>{errorMessage}</Text>)

renderFile.description: A custom render prop function to display general file information.
renderFile.defaultValue: (({ selectedFile, textProps }) => { return selectedFile ? (<Center marginTop={8} gap={10} flexDirection="column" {...views?.container}><Text maxLines={2} {...textProps} {...views?.text}>{selectedFile.name}</Text><Text {...textProps} {...views?.text}>({Math.round(selectedFile.size / 1024)} KB)</Text></Center>) : null; })

renderProgress.description: A custom render prop function to display upload progress.
renderProgress.defaultValue: (({ progress, progressProps }) => <Horizontal gap={8} alignItems="center" {...progressProps} {...views?.horizontal}><View height={4} backgroundColor="rgba(0,0,0,0.1)" width="100%" borderRadius={2} {...views?.view}><View height={4} width={`${progress}%`} borderRadius={2} backgroundColor="color-dark-50" {...views?.view}/></View><Text fontSize={12} {...views?.text}>{progress}%</Text></Horizontal>)

previewUrl.description: The URL of the file to be previewed.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL of the thumbnail image to be displayed.

errorMessage.description: The error message string to display to the user.

isLoading.description: Boolean indicating whether the Uploader is in a loading state.

icon.description: A React node to be rendered as the main icon within the Uploader.

text.description: The text content to be displayed within the Uploader's interface.

progress.description: The current upload progress, typically a number between 0 and 100.

fileType.description: Indicates the type of file currently being handled ('video', 'image', or 'file').

handleClick.description: A handler function invoked when the Uploader's clickable area is interacted with.

views.type: { container?: ViewProps; view?: ViewProps; image?: ImageProps; horizontal?: ViewProps; text?: ViewProps; }
views.description: An object containing nested style or component props for specific sub-views.
